title: Wynncraft: Malevolent Shrine Totem
description: Changes the normal Wynncraft totem to look like Sukuna's Malevolent Shrine from Jujutsu Kaisen
body:
Sorry this doesn't work anymore because with Fruma the wynncraft pack has now obfuscated the totem file and thus made it really difficult to remodel without scrounging through piles of random numbers to find it and changing the name every time the resource pack refreshes. I will leave this up in case someone thinks it's cool or if this changes sometime in the future.

OUTDATED as of April 19th 2026:
Ever thought it would be cool to use the Acolyte archetype as Sukuna? This pack changes the standard Shaman totem and the Skyseer totem in Wynncraft to Sukuna's Malevolent Shrine from Jujutsu Kaisen.

Note: If you only want a specific type to be shown as the shrine (eg. skyseer), delete the .json file for the other totem (shaman=totem_0, skyseer=totem_1) in the models folder of the pack.

This pack works only on 1.21.11+ and will not function outside of Wynncraft.

Thanks to Rythew for help with getting the model to work

If you have any questions or would like to suggest future models for Wynncraft you can contact me on discord: tictacocat
